title: Braeburn Apple Cobbler
description: A delicious dessert featuring tender apples and a crunchy topping.
instructions: 2. Peel, core, and slice the Braeburn apples.
3. In a large bowl, combine the sliced apples, granulated sugar, cinnamon, baking powder, and salt. Mix until the apples are evenly coated.
4. In a separate bowl, whisk together the flour and cold unsalted butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
5. Add the egg to the flour mixture and stir until a dough forms.
6. Pour the apple mixture into a 9x9 inch baking dish. Top with the dough, spreading it evenly to cover the apples.
7. Bake the cobbler for 40-45 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the apples are tender.
8. Remove the cobbler from the oven and let it cool for 10-15 minutes before serving. If desired, drizzle with a small amount of Bitter American whiskey.
